definition:
1. to fall  or throw oneself forward , as in rowing, προπεσόντες ἔρεσσον, like Lat. incumbere remis, (Odyssey by Homer):—;of suppliants, to fall prostrate , (Euripides) 
2. to rush forward, rush headlong , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
3. to move forwards, advance before  the rest, (Polybius Historicus): to project , (Polybius Historicus) 
4. προπίτνω poetry for προπίπτω 
5. to fall prostate , ἐς γᾶν (Aeschulus Tragicus) (ML)
